title: Discover BackShip — BackMarket’s shipping service
bodyHtml:
In addition to France, our home country, Back Market is present in 14 other markets: Italy, Portugal, Austria, Belgium, Sweden, Slovakia, Greece, Finland, Spain, Ireland, Germany, the Netherlands, UK, and the US. In these newer markets, your chance of winning BackBoxes is higher due to less competition.

Our analysis shows that a seller who opens in Germany and Spain, in addition to France, will double their monthly sales on average. But what if you don't have a competitive shipping contract to deliver internationally? Or what if you don't know how to manage returns from abroad? To provide you with a turnkey solution to these questions, we created BackShip.
 

What is BackShip?

BackShip is a service that allows you to issue shipping labels directly from your Back Office in 1 click. The service allows you to benefit from competitive prices with our international shipping partners, including DHL Express, Chronopost, Colissimo, DPD, UPS, and Correos Express. And with delivery guaranteed within 24 hours of shipment, you’ll be able to increase your customer conversion rate. 

Using BackShip with an API is also available! Sellers who use BackShip can create shipping labels automatically after confirming their orders via an API. To learn more about creating BackShip shipping labels in bulk, read this article


Can I still use BackShip if I don’t sell internationally?

Absolutely. Keep reading for the benefits of using BackShip domestically and internationally. 
 

What are the benefits of using BackShip?

  • Access to new countries with international delivery to all of Europe within 1 click 
  • Competitive shipping prices negotiated by Back Market 
  • Access to more customers and increased sales by selling in more countries
  • Improved quality score to increase your margins and win more BackBoxes
  • Labels directly downloaded within 1 click in your Back Office
  • Automatic package pickup scheduling with DHL Express, UPS, Correos, Chronopost, and DPD
  • Optional package insurance 
  • Worry-free shipping with Back Market agents opening and leading shipping provider investigations


For more information on BackShip, continue reading here
